sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n5777" key="a)mfide/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀμφι-δέτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, (<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">δέω</foreign> A) <sense id="n5777.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">yoke</tr_> for oxen, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0553.tlg001:2:24" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Artem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.24</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="2" id="n5777.1" level="3" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">necklace,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2598.tlg010:164:21" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Procop.Gaz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ecphr.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">164.21</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
